description:
Operating Area: Croatia

Step aboard the 80ft luxury sailing catamaran HONEYBIRD and indulge in a high-end charter experience along the stunning Croatian coast. This sleek Sunreef 80, in the exclusive owner’s version layout, accommodates up to six guests and is attended by a professional Croatian crew of four, offering the perfect balance of privacy, comfort, and personalized service. The owner’s version ensures an expansive master suite with exceptional space and elegance, elevating the onboard experience to a new level of luxury.

Designed with modern sophistication, HONEYBIRD features expansive living areas, including a spacious flybridge with a shaded dining lounge, plush sunbeds, a wet bar, and dual helm stations. The foredeck invites you to unwind in complete serenity, while the stylish aft cockpit is perfect for al fresco dining or simply soaking in the views. Whether you're island-hopping through the Dalmatian archipelago or anchoring in a quiet cove, every day brings a new Adriatic adventure.

Your private chef will delight you with gourmet meals tailored to your preferences, while the attentive crew ensures every detail of your journey is seamless. Sip handcrafted cocktails at sunset, take in the sea breeze from the deck, or dive into crystal-clear waters right from the stern.

With luxurious interiors, state-of-the-art amenities, and a dedicated crew devoted to delivering exceptional service, HONEYBIRD offers more than just a sailing holiday—it’s a fully immersive yachting experience. From vibrant coastal towns to hidden bays, this charter is your gateway to Croatia's most breathtaking sights. Let HONEYBIRD be your floating sanctuary as you explore the Adriatic in true style and comfort.

crew.name: Duje Žaja
crew.bio:
Croatian
A seasoned and versatile Captain who brings over a decade of experience in the sailing and yachting industry. His maritime journey began with hands-on roles skippering sailing yachts and catamarans in the charter sector, where he developed strong navigational skills, vessel handling expertise, and a client-first approach.

His service in the Croatian Navy further shaped his discipline and seamanship, notably serving as helmsman aboard a 50-meter vessel—an experience that sharpened his ability to perform under pressure and manage complex operations with precision.
Since then, he has captained a wide range of private and charter vessels, currently commanding a 24-meter catamaran on both coastal and offshore voyages. He is known for delivering discreet, highly personalized experiences while maintaining a strong focus on safety and professionalism.

He is STCW-certified across all core safety, medical, and operational areas, including Advanced Firefighting, GMDSS, Bridge Resource Management, and holds the STCW II/1 Officer of the Watch (Yachts less than 3,000 GT) endorsement—affirming his qualification for bridge duties on vessels up to 3000 gross tons.

Outside his command duties, he is an avid scuba diver and spearfisherman, with personal passions for photography, cooking, and meticulous yacht maintenance.

Leading by example, he cultivates a well-organized, motivated crew environment that consistently exceeds guest expectations and ensures smooth, high-standard operations at sea.

crew.name: Petar Tomas
crew.bio:
Croatian
Enthusiastic and reliable sailor with 1.5 years of hands-on experience in the charter industry, including guest check-ins/check-outs, skipper training, and dive instruction.

Skilled in boat handling, navigation, and safety protocols, with a strong focus on delivering smooth and enjoyable client experiences. In addition to skippering duties, I provided diving excursions and courses, conducted boat transfers, and ensured vessels were impeccably maintained during the off-season.

Detail-oriented, adaptable, and professional, with a strong commitment to safety, efficiency, and high service standards.

crew.name: Mihaela Mijić
crew.bio:
Croatian
Mihaela is a dedicated and experienced hostess who brings warmth, professionalism, and attention to detail to every charter. With multiple seasons working aboard catamarans, she has developed a strong reputation for exceptional service and guest satisfaction.

She holds a professional qualification for hostesses and a Boat Skipper B category license, ensuring she’s well-versed in onboard safety and operations. Guests consistently praise Mihaela for her delicious breakfast and lunch preparations, impeccable cleanliness, and thoughtful local recommendations that enhance the guest experience at each destination.
Clients have described her as going "above and beyond" to ensure all needs are met, creating a warm and relaxed atmosphere on board. With her background in hospitality and a passion for the sea, Mihaela is an invaluable addition to Honeybird crew.
